title: WaypointPlan
description: Contract between the LLM planner and the Nav2 executor. v1 design decision: the LLM references named map locations only — never raw coordinates — so every waypoint is validated against the map before execution and coordinate hallucination is structurally impossible.

understood.description: False if the command cannot be safely executed without clarification.

clarification_question.description: Required (non-null) when understood is false: the single question to ask the operator.

plan.description: Ordered steps. Must be empty when understood is false.

target.description: Named map location. Required for navigate; null for wait.

duration_s.description: Wait duration in seconds (wait action only).

on_blocked.description: Contingency if this step's path is blocked. Default (null) = Nav2's own recovery behaviors.

reason.description: One short sentence: why this step serves the command.

notes.description: Assumptions made, ambiguities resolved with safe defaults, or capability limits (e.g. robot cannot clean/grasp).
